sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 텍사스 인스트루먼트는 산업 및 데이터 센터 부문의 성장에 힘입어 1분기 매출 48억 3,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 48억 3,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 19% 증가했으며, 산업 및 데이터 센터 부문이 성장을 견인했습니다.
주당순이익(EPS)은 1.68달러를 기록했으며, 이는 당초 가이던스에 포함되지 않았던 5센트의 이익이 반영된 결과입니다.

businessChanges.text: 지난 12개월 동안 R&D 및 SG&A에 39억 달러, 자본 지출에 41억 달러를 투자했으며 주주에게 60억 달러를 환원했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 지난 12개월 기준 영업 현금흐름은 78억 달러, 잉여 현금흐름은 44억 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 산업 및 데이터 센터 부문의 성장세가 2분기 가이던스 달성에 지속적으로 기여할지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99 2 q12026txnex99-eredgar.htm EX-99 Document Exhibit 99 TI reports first quarter 2026 financial results and shareholder returns Conference call at 3:30 p.m. Central time today on ti.com/ir DALLAS (April 22, 2026) – Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) (Nasdaq: TXN) today reported first quarter revenue of $4.83 billion, net income of $1.55 billion and earnings per share of $1.68. Earnings per share included a 5-cent benefit that was not in the company's original guidance. Regarding the company's performance and returns to shareholders, Haviv Ilan, TI's chairman, president and CEO, made the following comments: • "Revenue increased 9% sequentially and 19% from the same quarter a year ago with growth led by industrial and data center. • "Our cash flow from operations of $7.8 billion for the trailing 12 months agai  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.83 billion = 48억 3,000만 달러; $1.55 billion = 15억 5,000만 달러; $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $4.83 = 4.83달러; $1.55 = 1.55달러; $1.68 = 1.68달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러.

portfolio and the benefit of 300mm production. Free cash flow for the same period was $4.4 billion. • "Over the past 12 months we invested $3.9 billion in R&D and SG&A, invested $4.1 billion in capital expenditures and returned $6.0 billion to owners. • "TI's second quarter outlook is for revenue in the range of $5.00 billion to $5.40 billion and earnings per share between $1.77 and $2.05." 1 Free cash flow, a non-GAAP financial measure, is cash flow from operations less capital expenditures, plus proceeds from U.S. CHIPS and Science Act (CHIPS Act) incentives. Earnings summary (In millions, except per-share amounts) Q1 2026 Q1 2025 Change Revenue $ 4,825 $ 4,069 19 % Operating profit $ 1,808 $ 1,324 37 % Net income $ 1,545 $ 1,179 3  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.4 billion = 44억 달러; $3.9 billion = 39억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $5.00 billion = 50억 달러; $5.40 billion = 54억 달러; $4.4 = 4.4달러; $3.9 = 3.9달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $5.00 = 5.00달러; $5.40 = 5.40달러.
